title: Raymond James (RJF) Aided by Strategic Buyouts Amid IB Woes
text: A strong balance sheet, opportunistic buyouts and PCG segment performance are likely to keep supporting Raymond James (RJF). However, elevated expenses and the volatile nature of the IB business are headwinds.

title: Raymond James: Solid, Profitable and Undervalued
text: In just six months and a few days, the share price of Raymond James Financial Inc. ( RJF , Financial) fell 30.45%. On Nov. 10, 2022, it hit an all-time high of $123.98, and by the close on May 16, it was down to $86.22.

title: 16 Stocks Run Circles Around Warren Buffett Over The Long Haul
text: Warren Buffett held court again at Berkshire Hathaway's shareholder meeting. But his company could learn from some other S&P 500 companies.
